brokerCatalog.name: FastPeopleSearch
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Fast people-search site with reliable scan results and a direct removal path.

brokerCatalog.name: TruePeopleSearch
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: High-value people-search site with fast scans and a familiar removal workflow.

brokerCatalog.name: CyberBackgroundChecks
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Background-check style people-search site that usually returns useful public-record matches quickly.

brokerCatalog.name: SmartBackgroundChecks
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Related background-check style directory with strong scan coverage and low scan friction.

brokerCatalog.name: Advanced Background Checks
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Background-check style directory with validated search results and useful match evidence.

brokerCatalog.name: ThatsThem
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: People-search and contact-data site that is usually low-friction to scan.

brokerCatalog.name: Whitepages
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Large people-search directory. Scans are useful, but removal can require extra verification.

brokerCatalog.name: Intelius
brokerCatalog.impactReason: PeopleConnect suppression can affect multiple affiliated properties.
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: PeopleConnect broker family. One workflow can matter across multiple affiliated sites.
brokerCatalog.userNote: PeopleConnect family

brokerCatalog.name: Nuwber
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: People-search site with useful listing evidence, but scans can require a visible agreement/CAPTCHA step.

brokerCatalog.name: MyLife
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Reputation and people-search site. Useful coverage, but matches can be noisy and may need review.

brokerCatalog.name: USAPeopleSearch
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: People-search directory with good coverage, but browser challenges are possible.

brokerCatalog.name: PeopleSearchNow
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: People-search broker with useful listing evidence and a removal path worth tracking.

brokerCatalog.name: SearchPeopleFree
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Free people-search site with validated scan coverage and a removal workflow that can require follow-up.

brokerCatalog.name: TruePeopleSearch.net
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Deprecated TruePeopleSearch-branded domain. The current site is unreliable and should not run in normal scans.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Deprecated 2026-06-24: truepeoplesearch.net is stale/unreliable and was being confused with TruePeopleSearch.com coverage. Keep historical rows only.

brokerCatalog.name: USAOfficialData
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Deprecated public-records style people-search site. Current DNS fails and BADBOOL removed it on 2026-06-05.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Deprecated 2026-06-13: removed from normal coverage after BADBOOL dropped usa-official.com and live DNS failed.

brokerCatalog.name: USPhoneBook
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Phonebook-style people-search site with valuable phone and address exposure coverage.

brokerCatalog.name: Spokeo
brokerCatalog.impactReason: Major people-search brand and broad exposure surface.
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Major people-search broker. Valuable coverage, but the site can push users toward paid-report funnels.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Search deprecated 2026-06-16: paywall/funnel surface wastes manual review time. Keep opt-out/removal support via spokeo.com/optout.

brokerCatalog.name: BeenVerified
brokerCatalog.impactReason: Large LTVCo broker network with multiple affiliated products.
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Large broker network with high value when a correct match is found. Requires careful match review.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Paywall/funnel surface

brokerCatalog.name: SearchQuarry
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Public-records search site. Useful, but results are often teaser-style and need careful review.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Teaser/paywall surface

brokerCatalog.name: InfoTracer
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Broken InfoPay/InfoTracer records broker. The current public search flow opens a BeenVerified affiliate funnel instead of an InfoTracer-owned results page.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Deprecated 2026-06-13: public search route currently funnels to BeenVerified; review again after 2026-07-13.

brokerCatalog.name: Radaris
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Large people-search broker with useful coverage, but results can be noisy.

brokerCatalog.name: CheckPeople
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Background-check funnel. The homepage search flow ends in paid-report prompts without a useful evidence surface.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Search deprecated: use the direct opt-out flow, not homepage search/manual review.

brokerCatalog.name: PublicDataUSA
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Deprecated public-records style directory. BADBOOL removed it on 2026-06-05 and the live opt-out route was already parked as broker-broken.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Deprecated: upstream BADBOOL removed publicdatausa.com; keep only historical rows/evidence.

brokerCatalog.name: FamilyTreeNow
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Genealogy directory that can expose relatives, addresses, and age-linked records. Discovery-only; its removal flow is not validated here yet.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: Ancestry
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Genealogy platform. Shows historical public records, not a people-search listing. There is no normal broker opt-out for found records.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: NeighborReport
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Address and neighborhood report site. Keep only as Extended Records/property exposure; it is not a normal people-search broker target.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: PeopleByName
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Older people-search directory. Useful as a completeness check and stale-record detector.

brokerCatalog.name: PrivateEye
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: PeopleFinders-backed search surface. Useful for scan evidence even when removal routing is weaker.

brokerCatalog.name: PrivateRecords
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Records-search site with current scan support and potentially noisy same-state results.

brokerCatalog.name: Unmask
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Affiliate report funnel. Current public search redirects to information.com instead of exposing a useful Unmask result surface.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Search deprecated 2026-06-17: live flow redirects to an information.com staged report/pay funnel, so not_found rows are not useful evidence.

brokerCatalog.name: PropertyRecs
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Property-records search surface for address-linked exposure. Public-record data; not a normal people-search removal target.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: Voterrecords
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Voter-registration records directory. Shows civic-registration exposure; removal depends on state rules, not a broker opt-out.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: Zoominfo
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Professional/B2B data broker. Shows work-profile exposure, not classic people search; removal is a separate manual process.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: Rehold
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Property and resident-history directory. Good for address-history discovery, but not a normal people-search removal target.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: Archives
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Historical public-record archive. Shows exposure in old records; there is no normal broker opt-out for found records.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: Classmates
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Yearbook and school directory (PeopleConnect family). Shows identity exposure beyond addresses; not a normal listing removal.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: FamilySearch
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Genealogy provider. Useful for exposure discovery in historical records; not standard removal automation.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: FreePeopleDirectory
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Shelved Spokeo-powered directory flow. Keep out of normal scans until the search and opt-out behavior is revalidated.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Shelved: Spokeo-powered flow with no current direct opt-out target. Revalidate before adding to standard scans.

brokerCatalog.name: Acxiom
brokerCatalog.impactReason: Wholesale identity/data broker with downstream ecosystem impact.
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Wholesale data broker. No public profile search exists, but opt-out can reduce downstream re-seeding risk.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Acxiom has no public profile page to prove found or removed. The app submits one suppression request, stores broker confirmation evidence, then waits at least 90 days before allowing another request.

brokerCatalog.name: SocialCatfish
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Deep-search broker with a long automated scan flow. Keep it in Advanced because it is slower and noisier than normal people-search sites.

brokerCatalog.name: SpyFly
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: People-search broker that can require Cloudflare clearance during scans or removal work.

brokerCatalog.name: Veripages
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: People-search site with extra confirmation and review steps. Best used when intentionally doing broad coverage.

brokerCatalog.name: Unitedstatesphonebook
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Phonebook-style broker with valuable data but slower, less predictable site behavior.

brokerCatalog.name: FaceCheckID
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Face-search provider. Useful for exposure awareness, but it is not a normal people-search scan or removal.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.

brokerCatalog.name: PimEyes
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: Face-search provider. Useful for exposure awareness, but it needs separate expectations from broker removal.
brokerCatalog.userNote: Extended Records source: removal here is record-by-record, manual, or unavailable — not a standard people-search opt-out.
